name: Invenio Sync to WP Rentals (V3 Test 5 Villas)

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "title": "{{ $('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.villa_name }}",
  "tagline": "{{ $('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.tagline }}",
  "property_description": {{ JSON.stringify($('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.description) }},
  "property_price_per_week": {{ $('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.minimum_price || 0 }},
  "property_city": [ "{{ [$('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.areaname] }}" ],
  "property_country": [ "{{ [$('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.country] }}" ],
  "property_area": [ "{{ [$('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.district] }}" ],
  "property_latitude": "{{ $('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.gps ? $('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.gps.split(',')[0].trim() : '' }}",
  "property_longitude": "{{ $('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.gps && $('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.gps.includes(',') ? $('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.gps.split(',')[1].trim() : '' }}",
  "check-in-hour": "{{ $('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.check_in }}",
  "check-out-hour": "{{ $('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.check_out }}",
  "license": "{{ $('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.license }}",
  
  "deposit": {{ $('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.deposit || 0 }},
  "images": {{ JSON.stringify($('Upload Photos to WP Media').item.json.uploaded_images_ids || []) }},
  
  "meta_fields": {
    "property_bedrooms": "{{ $('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.bedrooms || '' }}",
    "property_bathrooms": "{{ $('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.bathrooms || '' }}",
    "property_rooms": "{{ $('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.rooms || '' }}",
    "property_guest_no": "{{ $('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.sleeps || '' }}"
  },
  "taxonomies": {
    "property_features": {{ JSON.stringify($('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.features || []) }}
  },
  "custom_fields": [
    { "slug": "v_uuid", "value": "{{ $('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.v_uuid }}" },
    { "slug": "minimum_nights", "value": "{{ $('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.minimum_nights || '' }}" },
    { "slug": "maximum_price", "value": "{{ $('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.maximum_price || '' }}" },
    { "slug": "cleaning_charge", "value": "{{ $('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.cleaning_charge || '' }}" },
    { "slug": "cleaning_type", "value": "{{ $('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.cleaning || '' }}" },
    { "slug": "sleeps", "value": "{{ $('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.sleeps || '' }}" },
    { "slug": "allow_shortstays", "value": "{{ $('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.allow_shortstays || '' }}" }
  ],
  
  "custom_price": {{ JSON.stringify($('Invenio - Get Prices').item.json.price_data && $('Invenio - Get Prices').item.json.price_data[$('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.v_uuid] ? $('Invenio - Get Prices').item.json.price_data[$('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.v_uuid].map(p => ({ date_range: { from: p.start_date, to: p.end_date }, price: p.amount, details: { minimum_nights: p.minimum_nights || 1, checkin_day: p.allowed_checkin_days || ""} })) : []) }},
  "ical_feeds": {{ $('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.ical_url ? JSON.stringify([{ feed: $('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.ical_url, name: "Invenio iCal" }]) : "[]" }}

}

  "property_description": {{ JSON.stringify($('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.description) }},

  "check-in-hour": "{{ $('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.check_in }}",

    { "slug": "cleaning_type", "value": "{{ $('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.cleaning || '' }}" },
    { "slug": "sleeps", "value": "{{ $('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.sleeps || '' }}" },
    { "slug": "allow_shortstays", "value": "{{ $('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.allow_shortstays || '' }}" }
  ],
  
  "custom_price": {{ JSON.stringify($('Invenio - Get Prices').item.json.price_data && $('Invenio - Get Prices').item.json.price_data[$('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.v_uuid] ? $('Invenio - Get Prices').item.json.price_data[$('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.v_uuid].map(p => ({ date_range: { from: p.start_date, to: p.end_date }, price: p.amount, details: { minimum_nights: p.minimum_nights || 1, checkin_day: p.allowed_checkin_days || ""} })) : []) }},
  "ical_feeds": {{ $('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.ical_url ? JSON.stringify([{ feed: $('Loop insert 1 villa').item.json.ical_url, name: "Invenio iCal" }]) : "[]" }}
}
